package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_transaction_per_row_bulk_write: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Database access. Flag bulk writes that open and commit one transaction per row.
type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWrite(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWriteDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_database_access"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    db.Where("id IN ?", items).Limit(100).Find(&[]any{})
    perf_layer_database_access_transaction_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "database": 3, "access": 4, "transaction": 5, "per": 6}
    perf_layer_database_access_transaction_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_database_access_transaction_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_database_access_transaction_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    database_negative_2 := db.Where("database_id = ?", input)
    _ = database_negative_2
    access_negative_3 := perf_layer_database_access_transaction_negative["access"] + len(input)
    _ = access_negative_3
    transaction_negative_4 := perf_layer_database_access_transaction_negative["transaction"] + len(input)
    _ = transaction_negative_4
    for per_negative_5Index, item := range items { perf_layer_database_access_transaction_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_5Index }
    return nil
}
